Requester.reason: 'Ask the writing team for the internal announcement' names a vague collective ('the writing team'), not a single team-role peer; 'send `DocRequest`' names no recipient.

Writer.reason: 'hand it off so it can go out (send `DraftComms`)' names no recipient.

BrandReviewer.reason: 'When content comes to you' names no sender; 'pass it along as brand-approved (send `BrandApproved`)' names no recipient.

DocLead.reason: 'distribute the finished document company-wide (send `DocShipped`)' names no recipient role (Requester is never named here even though Requester's own text expects to receive it).

notes: Unlike pr_merge/content_pipeline/airline_seat/booking_saga, this worked example's paraphrase never names a directional peer for any send. 0/4 roles extractable.
